name: Tony (Tongyun) Yang
tagline: mean the limits of the world?
in more than we can name.
heroSpecialtyLine: I work on the hard, useful parts of AI. I want to build AI that serves people broadly, with fairness and real access for everyone.

paragraphs.lead: I've spent a while exploring all over AI
paragraphs.rest: , from emotion recognition and medical imaging to LLM routing and agent benchmarks. This spring I left my PhD fellowship. It was a hard call, but also a sobering dose, and now I have a clearer mind on what I want to do next.

AI is shifting from a scaling race to a systems race. Bigger models still matter, but they are not enough. What counts is how we train, route, compress, and ship them. I want AI that is capable, efficient, and genuinely useful.

paragraphs.lead: I'm an independent AI researcher in Amsterdam
paragraphs.highlight: Right now I'm reaching out and looking for the right next role.
paragraphs.restAfter: Prior to this, Marie Skłodowska-Curie Fellow, AI research engineer at TU Delft Imaging Physics, and an MSc from TU Delft.

intro: Open to research, in academia or industry. I care more about whether the work matters than which field it sits in.
currently: Independent AI researcher in Amsterdam, open to what's next.

directions.title: When data is scarce, design matters more
directions.blurb: When data is sensitive or scarce, you can't just scale your way to a good model. The gains come from better architecture and smarter methods.

directions.title: Powerful. But how useful, really?
directions.blurb: By now we all know AI is powerful. The harder part is making it useful for your actual work. Will it hold up when you depend on it? Can it slot into what you already do? The chatbot was just the first shape. I want to find the rest.

researchDek: The research I've worked on so far.
projectsIntro: Where the research turns into real systems. Some are live collaborations (Gradient Networks, Tencent, MeetaVista). The rest I build on my own time.

businessCard.name: Tony Yang
businessCard.looking: Open to research · academia or industry
businessCard.tagline: Hard problems where data is scarce · AI that's actually useful

contactInvitation: I read every message. Write to me about research, working together, supervision, or just to say hi. I usually reply within a day, and I am easy to talk to.
